rounds.prompt: Define the minimal Intent-level architecture contract for cross-process workflow consistency and durable evidence in Refine. Preserve the product, constitution, agent-first orchestration, and Foundation-Capabilities-Surfaces boundary. Make authoritative ownership and relationships explicit for Goals and rounds, workflow claims, operations, managed processes, capacity leases, target-app identity/root, Git branch/worktree evidence, and user-visible logs/evidence. Define the required transaction or optimistic-concurrency boundary, legal transition ordering, stale-write prevention, crash-durability expectations, failure and recovery semantics, compatibility/migration behavior, and thin-surface obligations. Reconcile only affected Intent documentation; do not broadly rewrite docs or prescribe incidental implementation machinery. Use the parked Supervisor recovery candidate aafdc696 and Quality candidate c1e9a9a only as evidence of the consistency gaps, not as implementations to merge. Produce a coherent contract the following implementation Goal can realize, with only proportional validation of the documentation or contract.

Revise the current Intent candidate into the smallest coherent architecture contract. Preserve only the durable invariants needed to prevent the observed governance and workflow violations: one shared cross-process coordination boundary; narrow authoritative ownership connected by stable identities; evidence durable before the state it proves; stale mutations conflict instead of overwriting newer decisions; acknowledged decisions are crash-repairable; agents retain adaptable judgment while Refine coordinates deterministic integrity; and every surface remains a thin adapter. Remove incident-shaped or implementation-prescriptive guidance such as step-by-step start, success, failure, cancellation, release, request/response, or migration recipes; avoid fixing exact field sets, response states, algorithms, or ordering mechanics where the invariant is enough. Keep the authority relationships only at the granularity necessary to preserve Foundation-Capabilities-Surfaces and target-app, Goal/round, claim, process/operation/capacity, Git, and evidence boundaries. Prefer one compact contract page with only the minimum navigation or overview reconciliation; remove broad cross-link edits that merely repeat the contract. Leave the following implementation Goal freedom to choose serialization, optimistic concurrency, journaling, or another design that satisfies the invariants. Continue to treat aafdc696 and c1e9a9a only as evidence. Documentation only; run proportional link and diff checks.
